templates.name: Data Analysis Template
templates.description: Template for structured data analysis and insights generation

example.task: Analyze monthly sales trends and identify growth drivers
example.context: E-commerce company with 2 years of monthly sales data across 5 product categories
questions: What are the overall sales trends?

templates.name: Root Cause Analysis Template
templates.description: Template for systematic investigation of problems and their causes

example.problem: API response times increased by 300% over the past week

templates.name: Comparative Analysis Template
templates.description: Template for systematic comparison of options or technologies

example.context: Building a SaaS application that needs to handle both structured transactional data and flexible document storage

templates.name: Impact Analysis Template
templates.description: Template for evaluating the effects of a proposed change

example.change: Migrate from monolithic architecture to microservices for the order processing system
example.stakeholders: Engineering team (15 developers), DevOps (3), QA (5), Customer Support (10), End users (50K+)

templates.name: Trend Analysis Template
templates.description: Template for identifying and projecting trends from data

questions: Which trends are accelerating vs decelerating?
What are the leading indicators of the next wave?
